The '''''Golden Song''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Crian Maru]]. The ship was used by Maru and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Dree Vandap]], during their quest to hunt down the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Kaox Krul]].<ref name="Darkness Shared" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|5|Darkness Shared|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
